info.description: Backend API for Maritime Transport System (MTS)
info.title: MTS Shipping Management API

post.description: Change password for an admin account
Create a new administrator account (only accessible by existing admin)
Authenticates user based on role and returns JWT tokens
Obtain a new access token using the refresh token

get.description: Download orders for a specific shipper as an Excel file
Download all ports as an Excel file
Download all shipping lines as an Excel file
Download all vessels as an Excel file

post.description: Upload an Excel file to add new ports
Upload an Excel file to add new shipping lines
Upload an Excel file to add new vessels

get.description: Get paginated list of orders for a specific shipper with sorting

post.description: Create a shipping order with multiple cargo items and automatic capacity check

400.description: Bad request (invalid parameters or insufficient capacity)

get.description: Get detailed information of a specific order

post.description: Cancel an order and release occupied capacity

get.description: Get paginated ports for a given city
Return details of a specific port

post.description: Change password for an authenticated shipper
Create a new shipper account (public registration)

get.description: Get all shipping lines with pagination
Return details of a specific shipping line
Retrieve the ordered list of port IDs for a shipping line

404.description: Line not found or no port sequence

post.description: Change password for an authenticated shipping company
Create a new shipping company account (public registration)

get.description: Get paginated vessels for a specific shipping company
Return details of a specific vessel
Get voyages that can transport required tonnage from start port to end port, sorted by remaining capacity descending

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and the JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
